---
title: "Data & resources"
description: "Data, workflows and scientific resources from the Caravagna Lab"
---

::: {.page-intro}
<p class="eyebrow">Outputs · Data & resources</p>

# Reusable research beyond papers and software.

Datasets, workflows, tutorials and other resources that support transparent and reproducible cancer data science.
:::

::: {.content-note}
**Editorial decision needed:** we will keep this page only if there is a sufficiently strong and maintainable collection of public resources.
:::

## Resources

Entries will link to repositories, archives, documentation and the publications that describe them.
